short_description: Income support for eligible land-holding farmer families.
target_users: Land-holding farmer families identified by State Governments and Union Territory administrations.
eligibility_summary: The official PM-KISAN page says eligible land-holding farmer families receive support as per scheme guidelines. It also lists exclusion categories such as institutional landholders, higher economic-status public representatives, certain government employees or pensioners, recent income-tax payers, and some registered professionals.
required_documents: Needs official verification for the exact current document list. The official portal provides farmer registration, eKYC, status, and update services.
benefits: Rs. 6,000 per year in three equal installments, directly transferred to beneficiary bank accounts.
application_steps: Use the official PM-KISAN portal. Start with New Farmer Registration or check Know Your Status. Complete required eKYC if applicable.
keywords: farmer agriculture kisan land holding rural income support eKYC

short_description: Loan support for micro and small business activities.

eligibility_summary: Needs official verification from a detailed .gov.in or .nic.in source before confirming eligibility.

benefits: Needs official verification from a detailed .gov.in or .nic.in source.
application_steps: Needs official verification from a detailed .gov.in or .nic.in source. Users should apply only through official government guidance or regulated financial institutions.

short_description: A Government of India portal for scholarship registration, scholarship applications, application status, and payment tracking.
target_users: Students applying for scholarships listed on the National Scholarship Portal.
eligibility_summary: Eligibility depends on the specific scholarship selected on the portal. The portal provides a Scholarship Eligibility section.
required_documents: Needs official verification for each specific scholarship. The portal uses One Time Registration from AY 2024-25 and says OTR is required to apply for scholarships on NSP.
benefits: Access to scholarship application and tracking services for schemes available on NSP.
application_steps: Visit the official NSP portal, complete One Time Registration if required, choose the relevant scholarship, apply online, and track application/payment status through official links.
keywords: student scholarship nsp education college school maharashtra income minority disability

short_description: Health protection scheme information for eligible beneficiaries.

eligibility_summary: Needs official verification from the PM-JAY portal before confirming household eligibility.
required_documents: Needs official verification from the PM-JAY portal.
benefits: Needs official verification from the PM-JAY portal before stating current benefit limits.
application_steps: Use the official PM-JAY portal or authorized government channels to check eligibility and services.

short_description: Housing assistance and affordable housing services under PMAY.
target_users: Urban and rural housing beneficiaries, depending on the PMAY component. This record points to the official urban portal.
eligibility_summary: Needs official verification for the user's PMAY component, income category, state, and current guidelines.
required_documents: Needs official verification from the relevant PMAY portal and state/urban local body.
benefits: Housing assistance or housing-related support depending on PMAY component and eligibility.
application_steps: For PMAY-Urban, use the official PMAY-U portal and Apply for PMAY-U 2.0 link. Verify local requirements with the relevant authority.
keywords: housing house awas urban rural home migrant poor ews lig

short_description: Official digital platform for skilling, upskilling, reskilling, career growth, and lifelong learning.
target_users: Learners, job seekers, workers, and people looking for skill training.
eligibility_summary: Eligibility depends on the course, training programme, or service selected on the official platform.
required_documents: Needs official verification for the selected course or programme.
benefits: Access to skill training and career-growth services on the official platform.
application_steps: Visit the official Skill India Digital portal, choose a relevant course or service, and follow the portal's registration process.
keywords: skill training job employment course upskilling reskilling youth student worker

short_description: Centralized Public Grievance Redress and Monitoring System.
target_users: Citizens who want to lodge, track, or appeal public grievances with government departments.
eligibility_summary: Any user with a public grievance should use the official portal and follow the portal rules. Some grievance types may have separate official channels.
required_documents: Needs official verification based on the grievance type. Do not upload unnecessary sensitive documents.
benefits: Lodge public grievances, check grievance status, lodge pension grievances, submit reminders or clarifications, and rate grievances.
application_steps: Visit the official CPGRAMS portal, choose Lodge Public Grievance or the relevant service, sign in if required, submit the grievance, and track status with the official portal.
keywords: grievance complaint cpgrams pension appeal status public grievance department
